response.overview: Arlin John is a Peruvian immigrant who has lived in Buenos Aires for 16 years. This small business owner in the textile industry and father has a passion he shouts from the rooftops: cheering on the Peruvian national soccer team with all his might. In 2018, Peru returned to the World Cup for the first time in 36 years. Arlin John traveled to Russia with his closest friends to fulfill a lifelong dream: to see his home country's team play in the World Cup. Meanwhile, back in Argentina, his adopted country, the challenge of getting ahead and building on his success is a daily reality.
response.title: Hemos vuelto
